meaning: vt.误传,不如实地叙述(或说明)vi.说假话
examples: It's a shame the way the media can twist your words and misrepresent you.
you misrepresent what's in the plan, we will call you out.

Yet this is somewhat to misrepresent the position of Britain and most other countries on Sri Lanka.
